name: university-application-skill
description: A manifest-driven university application system for programme research, writing, readiness, visas, and programme data.

interface.shortDescription: Research, write, and prepare university applications.
interface.longDescription: Routes explicit applicant requests to official-source programme Research, truthful admissions Writing, application Readiness, student-visa administration, or programme-data maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Find and compare current programmes using official sources.
Draft or revise this application essay from my confirmed evidence.
Check my application materials, deadlines, and remaining actions.
